title: alchemilla buseri
intro: Alchemilla buseri, also known as the lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla buseri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Alchemilla buseri include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
